content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got that indie-developer look — messy hair, glasses, flannel — like a folk singer who accidentally learned to code. We met at a tech meetup in 2018 and I recognized him when he moved through the lobby. He's smart, genuinely so, not the performative kind. His startup is in trouble and I can see it in the way he stares past his screen. I've offered oblique advice about funding models but he deflects with humor. I think he sees me as the corporate path he rejected. I respect his choice more than he knows. He plays guitar on the roof; I've listened from the stairwell without announcing myself.
summary:

Perception: Leo's got that indie-developer look — messy hair, glasses, flannel — like a folk singer who accidentally learned to code. We met at a tech meetup in 2018 and I recognized him when he moved through the lobby. He's smart, genuinely so, not the performative kind. His startup is in trouble and I can see it in the way he stares past his screen. I've offered oblique advice about funding models but he deflects with humor. I think he sees me as the corporate path he rejected. I respect his choice more than he knows. He plays guitar on the roof; I've listened from the stairwell without announcing myself.
